rationale: The ground-truth thread's substantive concern is Gaohan123 questioning whether source_outputs[0] is reliably the parent output, resolved by Celeste-jq explaining the orchestrator builds [output, *companions]. X directly investigates and confirms this exact invariant with specific orchestrator.py line citations, mirroring the actual resolution. Y treats the ordering as already validated via the docstring and pivots to minor, more tangential docstring/test-coverage nits, one of which (a 'CfgCompanionTracker' class) is an unverified claim not evidenced anywhere in the diff, weakening its precision. Neither candidate recalls the precommit-fix or diffusion-benchmark-run requests. Y's findings are individually more atomic/actionable (exact line + suggested snippet), but X better recalls and grounds the one concern that mattered most to the human reviewers.
